title: Code's Mod Unified
description: A compatible mod that helps your mods unified
body:
# Code Monad's Mod Unified

Adds compatibility between Cooking For Block Heads with Farmer's Delight's Cooking Pot, and Kaleidoscope's Pots.

## Adds Bridge to

- Farmer's Delight
- Miner's Delight
- Dungeon's Delight
- Kaleidoscope Cookery


![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edcb43bff8e0afb382cf2ed10cf62f520b9521f2.png)

## Features

- Cooking table now produces pot cooking foods
- Different pot automatic food transfering

## New Blocks

- Adds a new type of oven in order to heat Monster Pot from Dungeon's Delight
- Adds a new type of sink named Lava Sink, can provide lava soup bases

## How to use

1. Put cooking pot above ovens
2. Monster pot will need to put above dungeon oven
3. Check recipes in a connected cooking table
